name: Jinyu and Engjëlli, Your EXRP Team Members
description:

main scenario is that Urbanshade decides to send you (along with these two ladies) to retrieve the crystal at the Hadal Blacksite to test if you can meet your end of the deal of regaining your freedom and dropping all your charges for a clean record.
